# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: mesh_ingress_listener
    address:
      socket_address:
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 15001
    traffic_direction: INBOUND
    filter_chains:
    - name: inbound_http_filter_chain
      filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: inbound_hcm
          use_remote_address: true
          normalize_path: true
          merge_slashes: true
          path_with_escaped_slashes_action: UNESCAPE_AND_REDIRECT
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 300s
          stream_idle_timeout: 300s
          request_timeout: 30s
          delayed_close_timeout: 5s
          http_protocol_options:
            accept_http_10: true
          http2_protocol_options:
            max_concurrent_streams: 1000
            initial_stream_window_size: 65536
            initial_connection_window_size: 1048576
          route_config:
            name: inbound_routes
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: service_vhost
              domains: ["*"]
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: "/"
                route:
                  cluster: backend_service
                  timeout: 15s
                  idle_timeout: 300s
                  retry_policy:
                    retry_on: "5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset,retriable-status-codes"
                    num_retries: 3
                    per_try_timeout: 5s
                    retry_back_off:
                      base_interval: 0.25s
                      max_interval: 2s
                    retriable_status_codes: [503, 504]
                  hedge_policy:
                    initial_requests: 1
                    additional_request_chance:
                      numerator: 0
                      denominator: HUNDRED
                  max_grpc_timeout: 0s
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.filters.http.request_id
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.request_id.v3.RequestID
              pack_trace_reason: true
              use_request_id_for_trace_sampling: true
          - name: envoy.filters.http.ext_authz
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.ext_authz.v3.ExtAuthz
              transport_api_version: V3
              failure_mode_allow: false
              timeout: 2s
              with_request_body:
                max_request_bytes: 8192
                allow_partial_message: true
              grpc_service:
                envoy_grpc:
                  cluster_name: ext_authz
          - name: envoy.filters.http.rbac
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.rbac.v3.RBAC
              rules:
                action: ALLOW
                policies:
                  allow_all:
                    permissions:
                    - any: true
                    principals:
                    - any: true
          - name: envoy.filters.http.cors
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.cors.v3.Cors
          - name: envoy.filters.http.fault
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.fault.v3.HTTPFault
              delay:
                percentage:
                  numerator: 0
                  denominator: HUNDRED
                fixed_delay: 0.0s
              abort:
                percentage:
                  numerator: 0
                  denominator: HUNDRED
                http_status: 503
          - name: envoy.filters.http.router
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router

  - name: mesh_egress_listener
    address:
      socket_address:
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 15006
    traffic_direction: OUTBOUND
    filter_chains:
    - name: outbound_http_filter_chain
      filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: outbound_hcm
          use_remote_address: false
          normalize_path: true
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 300s
          stream_idle_timeout: 300s
          request_timeout: 30s
          route_config:
            name: outbound_routes
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: outbound_vhost
              domains: ["*"]
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: "/"
                route:
                  cluster: backend_service
                  timeout: 15s
                  retry_policy:
                    retry_on: "5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset,retriable-status-codes"
                    num_retries: 3
                    per_try_timeout: 5s
                    retry_back_off:
                      base_interval: 0.25s
                      max_interval: 2s
                    retriable_status_codes: [503, 504]
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.filters.http.request_id
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.request_id.v3.RequestID
              pack_trace_reason: true
              use_request_id_for_trace_sampling: true
          - name: envoy.filters.http.router
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router

  clusters:
  - name: backend_service
    type: STRICT_DNS
    connect_timeout: 2s
    dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    respect_dns_ttl: true
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1024
        max_pending_requests: 1024
        max_requests: 4096
        max_retries: 256
    outlier_detection:
      consecutive_5xx: 5
      interval: 5s
      base_ejection_time: 30s
      max_ejection_percent: 50
    common_http_protocol_options:
      idle_timeout: 300s
    upstream_connection_options:
      tcp_keepalive:
        keepalive_time: 60
        keepalive_interval: 10
        keepalive_probes: 3
    http2_protocol_options: {}
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: backend_service
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: backend.default.svc.cluster.local
                port_value: 8080

  - name: ext_authz
    type: STRICT_DNS
    connect_timeout: 1s
    dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    http2_protocol_options: {}
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: ext_authz
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: ext-authz.default.svc.cluster.local
                port_value: 9000

admin:

  address:
